titles.en: Seeking forgiveness through prayer after faults
Seeking forgiveness through prayer after faults

segments: ٢٩٩. وَقَالَ (عليه ‏السلام): مَا أَهَمَّنِي ذَنْبٌ أُمْهِلْتُ بَعْدَهُ حَتَّى أُصَلِّيَ رَكْعَتَيْنِ وَأسْأَلَ اللهَ الْعَافِيَة.
arabic.text: ٢٩٩. وَقَالَ (عليه ‏السلام): مَا أَهَمَّنِي ذَنْبٌ أُمْهِلْتُ بَعْدَهُ حَتَّى أُصَلِّيَ رَكْعَتَيْنِ وَأسْأَلَ اللهَ الْعَافِيَة.

segments: 299. Amīr al-mu’minīn, peace be upon him, said: I am not worried by a fault after which I get time to offer prayer in two units (rak‘ah) and beg safety from Allāh.
en.sayed-ali-raza.text: 299. Amīr al-mu’minīn, peace be upon him, said: I am not worried by a fault after which I get time to offer prayer in two units (rak‘ah) and beg safety from Allāh.
